theme.description: Ultra-premium, cinematic luxury dark theme inspired by Apple's product landing pages. Deep blacks, crisp white typography, frosted glass surfaces, and subtle ambient glows.

font_families.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter leading-tight text-white

surfaces.glow_effect: relative before:absolute before:inset-0 before:-z-10 before:bg-[#0071E3]/20 before:blur-3xl before:rounded-full

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFFFFF] text-black px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-medium hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-[#1C1C1E] text-white border border-white/10 px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-medium hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors duration-300

components.navbar: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#000000]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-6 md:px-12
components.footer: bg-[#111111] py-16 px-6 md:px-12 text-sm text-[#86868B] border-t border-white/10
components.feature_card: flex flex-col p-8 rounded-3xl bg-[#111111] border border-white/5 hover:border-white/15 transition-all duration-500 overflow-hidden relative
components.pricing_card: p-8 rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-[#111111] flex flex-col gap-6
components.pricing_card_featured: p-8 rounded-3xl border border-[#0071E3]/50 bg-[#1C1C1E] relative shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,113,227,0.15)] flex flex-col gap-6

hero_parallax.description: Use Framer Motion useScroll and useTransform to map scroll Y to translateY and scale of the hero MacBook image.

animations.progress_bar: initial width 0, animate to target width while in view with duration 1.5s ease-out

hero.description: MacBook edge glowing in the dark, perfect for the dramatic hero section reveal.

features.description: Colorful vibrant screen against dark background, ideal for the 'Liquid Retina Display' feature card.
Sleek silver profile of MacBook, ideal for the 'Ultra-Light Aluminum Design' feature.

performance.description: MacBook set up in a dark studio/desk environment, perfect for the split-screen performance section.

gallery.description: Glowing Apple logo from back of the laptop.
Silver MacBook floating gracefully in void.
Close up angled shot of grey and black keyboard/screen.

testimonials.description: Man with crossed arms in dark professional lighting.
Formal portrait of a young man in a suit.
Elegant portrait of smiling woman in business attire.

testing_attributes.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement smooth scrolling (Lenis) if possible, but definitely utilize framer-motion for heavy lifting of scroll-based fade/transforms.
Apply stark Apple-level whitespace; use massive padding between sections (py-32).
Features Section should use a Bento Box approach with 4 distinct items having frosted glass overlays.
For the Performance stats, use framer-motion animate to count up the numbers or fill the progress bars dynamically.
Product Carousel must allow users to swipe/scroll through the 'gallery' images horizontally with slight scale down on inactive cards.
Ensure the hero headline uses tight tracking and heavy weight (e.g., text-6xl tracking-tighter).
Never use pure black for cards on a pure black background—always use a slight offset like #111111 or #1C1C1E, or a glassmorphic border.
The middle pricing card MUST be highlighted with a soft blue glow outline or border (#0071E3) and stand out from the other two.
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes are attached to all actionable buttons, links, and forms for automated testing.
